Name: Finalize project scope
Description: Confirm MVP boundaries and required features from proposal.

Name: Create mobile + desktop wireframes
Description: Design core page layouts for Home/Search, Park Details, and Itinerary.

Name: Set up Sunny Trails project structure
Description: Create folders, base HTML pages, JS modules, and assets structure.

Name: Configure environment + API keys
Description: Set up configuration for National Park Service and Open-Meteo API usage.

Name: Create task workflow in Trello
Description: Define card labels, checklist conventions, and sprint grouping.

Name: Implement parkService.js
Description: Build National Park Service API functions for search and park detail retrieval.

Name: Implement weatherService.js
Description: Build Open-Meteo API functions for weather and forecast retrieval.

Name: Handle API errors gracefully
Description: Show user-friendly fallbacks when APIs fail or return incomplete data.

Name: Normalize API response data
Description: Map external data into consistent internal models for UI rendering.

Name: Build search UI + input handling
Description: Implement search by park name and state with responsive controls.

Name: Render park results list
Description: Display park cards with key summary info and image thumbnail.

Name: Add park sorting controls
Description: Allow sorting search results by selected criteria.

Name: Create parkCard.js component
Description: Render reusable park card markup for result lists.

Name: Create parkDetail.js component
Description: Render full park details view with description, location, and visitor info.

Name: Display park alerts in details view
Description: Show closures/warnings from NPS alerts data clearly.

Name: Display weather panel in details view
Description: Show temperature, wind, precipitation, and forecast for selected park.

Name: Build itinerary form
Description: Create form to save trip details tied to selected parks.

Name: Implement itinerary summary before save
Description: Show a quick preview of trip details before final save action.

Name: Implement itineraryList.js
Description: Display saved itineraries in a manageable list view.

Name: Add edit itinerary feature
Description: Allow users to update saved trip details.

Name: Add delete itinerary feature
Description: Allow users to remove a saved trip.

Name: Add notes support for trips
Description: Store and render free-form notes tied to each itinerary.

Name: Add gear checklist support
Description: Create checklist items for prep and packing tasks.

Name: Implement storage.js for local persistence
Description: Persist itineraries, notes, checklist items, and selected parks in local storage.

Name: Load persisted state on startup
Description: Hydrate UI from local storage on app load/refresh.

Name: Implement events.js
Description: Wire click and input events for search, save, edit, delete, and checklist actions.

Name: Create utilities.js helpers
Description: Add formatting and utility helpers for dates, values, and reusable operations.

Name: Define outdoor visual identity
Description: Apply green/earthy palette, blue accents, and readable typography.

Name: Refine responsive behavior
Description: Ensure good layout on mobile-first and desktop side-by-side sections.

Name: Add iconography and visual polish
Description: Use mountain/map-pin style icon direction for brand consistency.

Name: Implement accessibility pass
Description: Verify labels, keyboard navigation, semantics, and color contrast.

Name: Write unit tests for services
Description: Test API wrappers and data normalization logic.

Name: Write unit tests for storage + utilities
Description: Test local storage persistence and helper functions.

Name: Write unit tests for itinerary logic
Description: Test create/edit/delete and summary behavior.

Name: Run full QA regression
Description: Test complete user flows from search to saved itinerary.

Name: Cross-browser compatibility testing
Description: Verify behavior in Chrome, Edge, and Firefox.

Name: Fix defects found during testing
Description: Resolve priority bugs and validate fixes.

Name: Deploy Sunny Trails app
Description: Publish project and verify production functionality.

Name: Finalize documentation
Description: Update README and project notes with setup, features, and API details.

Name: Record final project walkthrough
Description: Prepare demo script/screenshots and final submission package.

Name: Connect APIs and validate responses
Description: Checkpoint: both APIs integrated and returning usable data.

Name: Build core itinerary flow
Description: Checkpoint: users can create and persist itineraries locally.

Name: Complete responsive UI and polish
Description: Checkpoint: UI finalized for mobile and desktop.

Name: Testing complete and deploy verified
Description: Checkpoint: QA done and deployment ready.

Name: Final submission complete
Description: Checkpoint: board link, repo, and deliverables submitted.
